body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: run_flags rename + sudo_relay igor-strip
body.intention: I intend to catch anything that silently depended on the old flags path or the Igor sudo_relay tool, so cleanup doesn't break a live caller.
body.description:
**What changed:** Renamed the ground_loop breaker dir `flags`→`run_flags` (+ `_IGOR_HOME`→`uu_home()`), and deleted the duplicate `igor/tools/sudo_relay.py` (the rack device + bus is the path).
**Predicted unintended effects:** (1) any external script or doc that touches `~/.unseen_university/flags/<name>.breaker` directly (outside the repo) now writes to a dead path — the breaker silently never trips; (2) a not-yet-found caller of the Igor sudo_relay tool (dynamic registry lookup by name, not a static import) breaks at call time, invisible to grep; (3) the rack device assumes a daemon started via `/start` in chat — if nothing starts it, sudo-relay capability is simply absent (was it ever actually used by Igor?).
**Signals to watch:** ground_loop logs showing breaker checks resolve under run_flags; any AttributeError/KeyError on a `sudo_relay` tool lookup in Igor logs; confirm no shell alias/cron references the old `flags` path (`grep -rn unseen_university/flags ~/.bashrc ~/.unseen_university` outside the repo).
**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-07-14 or when ground_loop next gates a device on a breaker.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Test plan:** no tests — this is an observation ticket

[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
